description: Regression thresholds for the before/after benchmark harness (issue #37). A deck fails the suite when any metric exceeds its max.

corruption.description: File unreadable / not a zip-pptx / structural OPC failure (0 = none allowed)

extraction_loss.description: Count of extract loss_ledger entries of severity error/high (held-out tolerance)

layout_failure.description: Hard layout/fit/validate errors that would block scaffold

visual_gate_failure.description: Gate 3 / vision_gate hard failures (when gate ran); 0 allowed in CI fixture mode

a11y_error.description: Accessibility error-severity findings on after tokens/deck
